title: selaginella longiciliata
intro: Selaginella longiciliata, also known as spikemoss, is a type of ancient, vascular plant belonging to the genus Selaginella, which is native to tropical regions of the world. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Selaginella longiciliata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antimicrobial agent, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Selaginella longiciliata is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
